chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.176 of 2015 [Hashim Raza v. Syed Muhammad Ali & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1621/2015 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 26.10.2023 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Appellant’s counsel is not regular and punctual in appearance. This Appeal is pending since 2015. On the last date Appellant and his counsel were called absent. Today again no one is in attendance on behalf of the Appellant and there is no intimation either. The instant Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
